theme: Light/Dark toggle required. Default: Light. Smart detection based on system preferences.

headings.usage: Property titles, AI scores, dashboard section headers. Prohibited: Inter.

body.usage: Property descriptions, distances, amenities, general UI text.

mono.usage: Use for price tags, AI match percentage numbers, and travel time data to give a technical 'computed' feel.

visual_enhancers.cards: Subtle border (1px border-border), rounded-2xl, no drop shadow by default. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-primary/30.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky map overlays, floating property summaries, and top nav: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70, backdrop-blur-xl, backdrop-saturate-150, 1px bottom/inner border border-white/20. NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.ai_elements: For top AI recommended properties, use the 'Tracing Beam' effect or a subtle shimmering emerald gradient border to distinguish from normal listings.
visual_enhancers.price_prediction: Show AI predicted rent as a soft 'Expected: ₹X' badge next to the actual price. If actual price is lower than predicted, highlight the difference in green (e.g., 'Great Deal!').
visual_enhancers.map_pins: Custom SVG markers using primary teal color. Selected property pin should have an absolute positioned div with animate-ping for a radar effect.

layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode B. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Dashboard should utilize dense widget style for AI stats and recently viewed.
layouts.search_view: Split Screen Layout. Left side: scrollable property list (col-span-12 lg:col-span-5). Right side: sticky Map view (hidden on mobile, lg:col-span-7) taking up h-[calc(100vh-80px)].
layouts.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 inside property cards. Use gap-8 for feature sections.

components.shadcn_customizations: Remove standard 'Vercel' look. Use rounded-2xl for Dialogs and Cards. Buttons should be pill-shaped (rounded-full).
components.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900 with subtle border focus-within:ring-primary.
components.badges: For Amenities (WiFi, AC, etc.): rounded-full, px-3 py-1, text-sm, bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300.

motion.page_transitions: Framer motion fade and slight slide-up (y: 10, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion.list_stagger: Property cards should stagger in using Framer Motion (staggerChildren: 0.1).
motion.interactions: All buttons MUST have hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform.

hero_backgrounds.description: Contemporary white and wooden villa exterior shot at daytime with elegant design.

property_interiors.description: Bright living room interior with modern furnishings and cozy atmosphere, featuring a gray sofa and indoor plants.
Modern living room with large sectional sofa and tv.

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for Duotone weights, giving a high-end app feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Teal primary buttons must use white text, not dark text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='property-card-123', data-testid='map-view-toggle').
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:outline-none on all inputs and buttons.

3d_and_map_libraries.map: Use 'react-leaflet' and 'leaflet'. Render maps with OpenStreetMap tiles. CRITICAL: Use map styling options (like CartoDB Positron URL) to make the map look premium and muted, rather than default raw OSM styling.
3d_and_map_libraries.animations: Use 'framer-motion' for 2D layout animations and page transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use .js or .jsx extensions for React components. Do NOT use .tsx.
Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-leaflet leaflet framer-motion i18next react-i18next'.
For multi-language support (English/Tamil), use 'i18next' and 'react-i18next'. Provide a sleek language toggle switch in the navbar.
Emphasize the 'AI Recommendation' score using JetBrains Mono font and Emerald/Teal colors to build trust.
Travel Time Calculator: Visually pair distance (km) and time (mins) with car/walk icons in a small highlighted pill/badge on the property card.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric. Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) inside cards to prevent a cramped feel.
Implement Sonner toasts for the 'Alerts' system (new house added, price drops).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
